focalElement: crimson cephalopod body launching an ember-rock from a wide pursed mouth, eight stubby tentacles radiating
secondaryElement: radial heat-wave rays from the mouth with soft volcanic-ash flecks
notes: Emberpeak regular (u-6b) — eightfold tentacle symmetry plus central projectile
